result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(old_owner)
), handled AS (
  SELECT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(ownerid)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(new_owner)
), handled_agg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(case_count) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(case_count) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agg h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(old_owner)
), handled AS (
  SELECT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(ownerid)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(new_owner)
), handled_agg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(case_count) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(case_count) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agg h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(old_owner)
), handled AS (
  SELECT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate >= DATE '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate <  DATE '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(ownerid)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(new_owner)
), handled_agg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(case_count) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(case_count) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agg h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    btrim(old_owner) AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE old_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(old_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(old_owner)
), handled AS (
  SELECT btrim(ownerid) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-01'
    AND createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-01'
    AND ownerid IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(ownerid) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(ownerid)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT btrim(new_owner) AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
  FROM owner_assignments
  WHERE new_owner IS NOT NULL
    AND btrim(new_owner) <> ''
  GROUP BY btrim(new_owner)
), handled_agg AS (
  SELECT agent_id, SUM(case_count) AS handled_cases
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING SUM(case_count) > 0
)
SELECT h.agent_id AS "Id"
FROM handled_agg h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count, 0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
